author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Universa Gameplay Trailer | Invincible VS
Earth's energy belongs to Her now.

Universa joins the Invincible VS roster when Season 1 drops on June 30th.

Universa is included in the Year 1 Character pass. Try her for yourself in Training Mode before purchase. 

Invincible VS is out now on XBOX Series X|S and PC: https://www.xbox.com/games/invincible-vs

Universa is the 19th Fighter announced for Invincible VS.

From ‪@Skybound‬ ‪and in-house studio Quarter Up. Buy now on XBOX Series X|S, and PC.
#Universa #invinciblevs #tagfighter

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales | Launch Trailer
The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales is out now! A brand-new action RPG from the creators of OCTOPATH TRAVELER and BRAVELY DEFAULT, The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales combines stunning HD-2D visuals and exciting action-adventure gameplay for the first time.

Enjoy intuitive and rewarding action-based battles with strategic support abilities from a fairy as you reveal this world’s mysterious history!

The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales is out now on XBOX Series X|S and XBOX on PC.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/the-adventures-of-elliot-the-millennium-tales/9PP9456CW5W3/0017

text:
The Grinch 2: Saving Christmas | Announce Trailer
Too early for Christmas? 

Good. 

The Grinch is back. 

From his cave on Mt.Crumpit to Who-ville, join him and Max on a mischievous co-op adventure to gather ornaments, overcome challenges, and decorate the ultimate Christmas tree. 

Coming soon to XBOX!

Fogpiercer - Release Date Announcement Trailer
Fogpiercer is coming to Xbox on PC and PC Game Pass on July 17th!

Fight through the fog in this sci-fi roguelike deckbuilder where clever positioning, explosive chain-reactions, and the environment itself can make the difference between life and death.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Garfield - Escape from Monday - Reveal Trailer
When you're a lazy cat spending most of his time sleeping, having a nightmare can happen. But a nightmare full of vegetables and sugar-free candies, no way!

After Jon fed him spinach lasagnas inspired by Chef Monday's recipe, Garfield falls into a deep sleep...
To wake up and reactivate his taste buds, the laziest cat in the world will explore worlds filled with enemies and eat a gigantic deal of lasagnas!

Dressed as a turkey, as a surfer or as a cowboy, explore 3 worlds and dozens of levels filled with enemies to fight and lasagnas to devour.

Garfield - Escape from Monday will be available on XBOX Series X|S.
https://www.xbox.com/games/store/garfield-escape-from-monday/9p7tkzmgwwvt
